creator: keren_sky@live.com
text:
(In reply to Marc Fonvieille from comment #1)

Hi,
I increased the maxdepth to 7000 as per your instructions. Unfortunately the build 
stopped/ failed again. The same error msg is displayed but with 'maximum number of nested template calls and variables/params' indicated as being equal to 7000 now.

Maybe this sort of build failure is why some recommend building with pouderire, instead of portmaster.

Cheers


Apologies for the late reply.
